title: Abu Ali Bal'ami
body: Abu Ali Muhammad Bal'ami (Persian: ابو علی محمد, died 992/997), also called Amirak Bal'ami (امیرک بلعمی) and Bal'ami-i Kuchak (بلعمی کوچک, "Bal'ami the Younger"), was a 10th-century Persian historian, writer, and vizier to the Samanids. He was from the influential Bal'ami family.
